codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature description and expected behavior: layout container width/padding/margins were updated to Uniswap-style proportions, desktop breakpoint moved to xl, right column fixed at 360px with 80px gap, and card-border wrappers were removed from chart, stats, transactions, and token info without touching business logic.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker reported that `agent-browser --viewport` did not produce widths above 1280px on this environment, which can block strict visual checks at 1440px and may cause confusion when validating xl breakpoints.

summary: Reviewed commit 9148f4d for feature layout-and-borderless-overhaul: no blocking or non-blocking code issues found, and the delivered changes align with requested layout/borderless requirements.
